title: zeuxine niijimae
intro: Zeuxine niijimae, also known as the Japanese arrow poison orchid, is a species of orchid native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. It contains zeuxine, a toxic compound that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and promote healing in the body. Zeuxine niijimae is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional herbal medicine, although its use requires caution and should be supervised by a qualified healthcare professional.
